D:\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\OpenGL_Experiment_Template.dir/objects.a
D:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\OpenGL_Experiment_Template.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\OpenGL_Experiment_Template.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\OpenGL_Experiment_Template.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o OpenGL_Experiment_Template.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libOpenGL_Experiment_Template.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\OpenGL_Experiment_Template.dir\linkLibs.rsp
